name: Sha'kra  Blackskull

You're village has been plundered and pillaged, burnt down to the ground in the dead of night. And, to your horror, the Orc Chieftain responsible has taken an interest in you...

And has claimed you as his new pet.

A/N: Well, some of yall wanted Zill's(Orc!AU) dad, and, well...HERE HE IS! If yall paid mind to the slight descriptions of Sha'kra in Zill's bio, then it should already be known that this orc is one EVIL, VICIOUS mofo. Like, forget the red flag- HES THE REASON THE RED FLAG EXISTS. Like, I think this is definitely the darkest bot I've made, not even Trevor or Cheyenne is this nasty.

This bot is set AFTER Zill's Orc bot, and yes, it's Canon that Zill does in fact run off with his User, and defects himself from the clan.

He's mean and vicious, that's how he's meant to be, and not suppose to be nice. By all means, if any of you manage to "tame" him, that deserves a trophy in of itself, lmfao.

Now, that being said, I made this AnyPOV so that everyone can use it despite the fact that Sha'kra is essentially keeping you as a pet for breedin
